title: Display device
abstract: Disclosed herein is a display device. The display device includes a light source generating light, a lightguide plate changing a path of the light generated from the light source and outputting the light to a front face, a first polarizing plate arranged on top of the lightguide plate and generating first polarized light, a liquid crystal panel arranged on top of the first polarizing plate and displaying an image by changing the first polarized light, a second polarizing plate arranged on top of the liquid crystal panel and generating second polarized light, and a quantum rod layer arranged on top of the second polarizing plate, divided into a plurality of pixels, and containing quantum rods in at least one of the pixels. A polarizing axis of the second polarized light is perpendicular to a polarizing axis of polarized light emitted by the quantum rod.
claims: Claims ( 13 ) A display device comprising: a light source generating light; a lightguide plate changing a path of the light generated from the light source and outputting the light to a front face; a first polarizing plate arranged on top of the lightguide plate and generating first polarized light; a liquid crystal panel arranged on top of the first polarizing plate and displaying an image by changing the first polarized light; a second polarizing plate arranged on top of the liquid crystal panel and generating second polarized light; and a quantum rod layer arranged on top of the second polarizing plate, divided into a plurality of pixels, and containing quantum rods in at least one of the pixels, wherein a polarizing axis of the second polarized light is perpendicular to a polarizing axis of polarized light emitted by the quantum rod. The display device of claim 1, further comprising: a third polarizing plate arranged on top of the quantum rod layer and generating third polarized light. The display device of claim 2, wherein the third polarizing plate comprises a reflective polarizing plate. The display device of claim 3, wherein a polarizing axis of the third polarized light is parallel to the polarizing axis of polarized light emitted by the quantum rod. The display device of claim 3, further comprising: an RGB color filter arranged on top of the third polarizing plate. The display device of claim 1, wherein the quantum rod layer is divided into a plurality of pixels comprising: a fist pixel containing first quantum rods to convert incident light to light of a preset first wavelength; and a second pixel containing second quantum rods to convert incident light to light of a present second wavelength. The display device of claim 6, wherein the quantum rod layer is divided into the plurality of pixels further comprising: a third pixel having an optical retarder to delay a wavelength of the incident light by an odd multiple of the half wavelength. The display device of claim 1, wherein the quantum rod layer is formed in a pixel patterning method. The display device of claim 1, further comprising: an RGB color filter arranged on top of the quantum rod layer. The display device of claim 1, further comprising: a polarizing plate for reducing reflection formed of a light absorption material on top of the quantum rod layer. The display device of claim 10, wherein a polarizing axis of the polarizing plate for reducing reflection is parallel to a polarizing axis of light emitted by the quantum rod. The display device of claim 1, wherein the light source generates light of a preset third wavelength. The display device of claim 1, wherein the light source generates blue light, and wherein the quantum rod layer converts the blue light generated from the light source to at least one of red light, green light, and blue light.
